title: Incorrect query result with SQLITE_ENABLE_STAT4
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table(id INTEGER, name NVARCHAR(255), age INTEGER, address NVARCHAR(255), PRIMARY KEY(id));
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES(2, 'Bob', NULL, '123 Main St');
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES(3, 'Charlie', 25, '456 Elm St');
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE (name = 'Alice' OR address IS NOT NULL) AND +age IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Incorrect results with IS NOT NULL and OR conditions
